title: Verify 'Cancel Trial' button triggers the Loss Aversion pop-up
description: Test that clicking the 'Cancel Trial' button from the Trial Corner opens the 'Loss Aversion' confirmation pop-up.
preconditions: User is on the Trial Corner screen

steps.description: 1. Locate the 'Cancel Trial' button in the 'Manage Trial' section

expected_result: A pop-up appears with the headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days.' and options to 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' and 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
